# PERF-137 negative: cache the source location in a package-level var
lang: go
file: PERF-137-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"runtime"
	"strconv"
)

var sourceTag = func() string {
	_, file, line, _ := runtime.Caller(0)
	return file + ":" + strconv.Itoa(line)
}()

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.Header().Set("X-Source", sourceTag)
	_ = r
}
